productDisplayName: French Connection Men White & Purple Check Shirt
description: Style NoteUnderstated and stylish, this simplistically designed shirt from french connection is just the thing you wear with a a fitted pair of chinos. Style this with denims and desert boots to add an interesting dimension to your outfitProduct DetailsWhite shirt with pink and purple checks, has a narrow spread collar, a buttoned placket, two buttoned flap pockets at the chest and a curved hemMaterial and care100% cottonWash as cottonWash and dry inside outSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
